headlines.title: Dr. Marty Makary is out as FDA commissioner
headlines.description: Dr. Marty Makary is out as commissioner of the Food and Drug Administration, the fourth high-profile departure of a member of his administration this year, according to two people familiar with the decision

headlines.title: Hantavirus cases rise to 11 as cruise ship passengers quarantine
headlines.description: A total of 11 hantavirus cases have been reported as of Tuesday morning, with global health officials warning that the number could rise, as one American who was on the cruise ship at the center of the outbreak revealed new details from his quarantine room

headlines.title: Florida surgeon who removed wrong organ says he is ‘forever traumatized’ by patient’s death
headlines.description: Thomas Shaknovsky said in a deposition in November that he believed he was removing 70-year-old William Bryan’s spleen, not his liver.

headlines.title: He pitched military service with a promise of lifetime healthcare. When he needed it, the system failed.
headlines.description: For more than a decade, Guy Shoemaker pitched military service to potential new recruits with one key promise: healthcare for life.“You’re going to have medical and dental for the rest of your life,” said Shoemaker, a retired Army sergeant first class and recruiter who spent a year in Afghanistan.

headlines.title: ‘A watershed moment’: A pancreatic cancer drug is set to transform treatment
headlines.description: An experimental pancreatic cancer drug that’s been shown to double survival in patients with advanced stages of the disease is poised to revolutionize the way the cancer is treated, oncologists say.

headlines.title: Emily Blunt Opens Up on Stuttering: Still Something I Contend With
headlines.description: Actor Emily Blunt, along with Heather Grossman, the executive director of the American Institute for Stuttering, join TODAY to talk about Blunt’s very personal lifelong journey with stuttering and raising awareness of the neurological disability. They break down the common misconceptions of people with stutters, and Blunt opens up about the environments that still give her trouble with speaking fluency, including when saying her own name. "You feel like there’s this sort of imposter in your

headlines.title: Best Over-the-Counter Medicines and Health Products of 2026
headlines.description: U.S. News and World Report senior health editor Shanley Chien joins TODAY to exclusively reveal some of their picks for the best over-the-counter medicine and health products of 2026. Categories include first aid, gut health, hydration and energy, and more.

headlines.title: How a Small Argentina Town Handled Hantavirus Outbreak in 2018
headlines.description: As health officials fight to contain the deadly hantavirus tied to the MV Hondius cruise ship, they are relying on limited understanding of how it is spread, according to infectious disease experts. But this isn’t the first outbreak of the Andes strain of the virus. The New England Journal of Medicine studied a 2018 outbreak in a small Andean town in southwest Argentina and infectious disease expert Dr. Abraar Karan says it shows similarities to how COVID-19 spread in large gatherings. NBC’s

headlines.title: Quarantined Passenger Talks Experience on Hantavirus-Hit Cruise
headlines.description: Jake Rosmarin, one of the American passengers on the Hantavirus-stricken cruise ship, joins TODAY to speak out on entering quarantine at a hospital in Nebraska and recalls being stuck on the boat during the deadly outbreak. “It was definitely a wave of emotions as we retrieved information and I think it became more scary when we found out that Cape Verde authorities weren’t allowing us to dock,” he says.

headlines.title: The best running watches, tested over hundreds of miles
headlines.description: I’ve tested dozens of running watches from Garmin, Coros, Amazfit, Fitbit, Apple and more. Here are my top picks for beginners, races and ultra-athletes alike.

headlines.title: The best men’s walking shoes of 2026, tested and reviewed
headlines.description: Shop expert-recommended and staff-tested men’s walking shoes from Brooks, On, New Balance and Hoka.

headlines.title: I’ve tested dozens of workout headphones: These are the best
headlines.description: I tested over a dozen workout headphones from brands like Apple, Beats, and Shokz to find our top picks for running, biking, the gym and more.
